## Checklist

- [ ] `.codex-plugin/plugin.json` is present.
- [ ] At least one `SKILL.md` is present.
- [ ] `marketplace/listings/<plugin>.json` is present.
- [ ] `python3 scripts/validate_marketplace.py` passes.
- [ ] Redistribution rights are clear.
- [ ] Pricing and data access are visible before install.
